response.original_title: Knocked Up by My Ex's Alpha Daddy
response.overview: Aria risked her life to enter the brutal War Academy for her boyfriend, only to find him in the arms of another woman. Devastated and betrayed, a moment of reckless anger leads her into a dangerous encounter with Blaze Blackwood—the ruthless Alpha King and her academy's Chief Proctor. Unbeknownst to Aria, Blaze is also her cheating ex's formidable father. After a passionate and accidental night together, Aria is horrified to discover she is pregnant. Trapped in an elite academy where she is mocked as a "Wolfless Omega," Aria must survive deadly trials, jealous rivals, and the terrifying presence of the Alpha King who refuses to let her go. Will she succumb to the powerful pull between them, or will her hidden secrets and their forbidden connection destroy them both?
response.title: Knocked Up by My Ex's Alpha Daddy
